backend/main.mo: Motoko actor validating DCF inputs and computing terminal value, discounted cash flows, and intrinsic share price.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing removed industry growth functionality and related frontend file changes for three features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing frontend file purposes including styling, utilities, DCF logic, components, and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base and theme CSS defining OKLCH color tokens and dark mode variables for global styling.
frontend/index.html: Main HTML entry point setting metadata, favicon, root div, and loading the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Top-level React component composing header, hero, inputs form, actions, and results with URL-synced state and validation.
frontend/src/components/CalculatorAction: Action buttons enabling example inputs, reset, and copyable shareable links with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/DcfInputsForm.ts: Form component rendering company snapshot fields and validation errors, updating DcfInputs state on change.
frontend/src/components/ResultsSection.t: UI component that calculates and displays intrinsic or actual per‑share values using hidden DCF calculations with animated output.
frontend/src/features/dcf/calculations.t: Performs backend-style DCF hidden value calculations with safe numeric helpers and returns a detailed object of computed metrics.
frontend/src/features/dcf/dcf.ts: Placeholder DCF module with no current implementation.
frontend/src/features/dcf/presets.ts: Defines the DcfInputs interface and provides default and example preset input values.
frontend/src/features/dcf/validation.ts: Validates DCF input fields and provides helpers to retrieve field-specific error messages.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Initializes and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, refetching dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountUp.ts: React hook that animates numeric transitions using a smooth count‑up effect.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Manages Internet Identity authentication state, loading, login, logout, and context provisioning.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides a react-query hook prepared for backend hidden-value calculations, currently returning null until backend support exists.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueryInputs.ts: Synchronizes DCF inputs with URL query parameters and generates shareable links preserving input state.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind layers, global CSS variables for light/dark themes, and base typography and layout styles.
frontend/src/lib/format.ts: Provides utilities for formatting currency, large currency values, percentages, and general numbers.
frontend/src/lib/number.ts: Implements safe numeric parsing and helpers for converting between decimal and percentage representations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers and loads global styles.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind theming, color tokens from CSS variables, custom animations, and plugin usage.
project_state.json: Stores the project’s state, features, and metadata for removing Industry Growth from the product.
